stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
A company intends to transport radioactive goods in the cargo compartment under the floor of a passenger aircraft. The package has a transport index of 5 and a height of 0.6 m. The cargo compartment has a height of 1.2 m. What is the appropriate decision regarding these goods?

options.a: The goods cannot be transported as they do not comply with the minimum distance requirement.
options.b: The goods may be transported as they are not in the passenger cabin.
options.c: The goods cannot be transported as they are on a passenger aircraft.
options.d: The goods cannot be transported as they are too dangerous.
